content: He had a side show gig that I attempted to handle for a few months offering tech support (on the phone) for users of a line of simulation software by an American company out of Wisconsin called "Persoft". I failed to really get behind the basics and eventually was overwhelmed to the point that Max and I unanimously quit and fired me in the same moment. Strangely enough, he offered to have his wife drive me to the nearby bus stop to which I had always walked previously. Upon leaving the residential area where they lived his wife drove into the intersection against the red light, glanced to her right past me sitting in the passenger seat and her eyes bugged out of her head.
